title: Validation report for ecrr.bbr.metadata.profiles.ecrrProfiles.ECRRCatalog - ECRR Catalog/Registry profile

entries.message:
ValidationError: 'schema:url' is a required property

    {'$schema': 'https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema',
     'description': 'schema for a labeled link, a profile of '
                    'schema.org/CreativeWork',
     'properties': {'@type': {'anyOf': [{'const': 'schema:CreativeWork',
                                         'type': 'string'},
                                        {'contains': {'const': 'schema:CreativeWork'},
                                         'items': {'type': 'string'},
                                         'type': 'array'}],
                              'default': 'schema:CreativeWork'},
                    'schema:description': {'type': 'string'},
                    'schema:name': {'type': 'string'},
                    'schema:url': {'format': 'uri', 'type': 'string'}},
     'required': ['@type', 'schema:url'],
     'type': 'object',
     'x-jsonld-prefixes': {'schema': 'http://schema.org/'}}

     'dcterms:conformsTo': [{'@id': 'https://w3id.org/cdif/core/1.0/'},

     'schema:sdDatePublished': '2026-03-03'}
